title: Mile End Bilingual Invoice Generator
tagline: Bill 96-compliant FR-primary invoices for Quebec freelancers and creative SMBs.

jtbd.situation: When invoicing Quebec clients requires French at equal or greater prominence
jtbd.persona: Mile End freelance videographer billing local agencies
jtbd.motivation: generate compliant bilingual invoices with QST/GST lines
jtbd.outcome: get paid faster without accountant invoice fixes
jtbd.statement: When billing Quebec clients, a Mile End freelancer wants FR-primary invoices so they comply with Bill 96 contract rules.

montrealAngle: Mile End creative freelancer cluster; Bill 96 consumer contract French requirement; many use English-only Stripe invoices.
whyNow: Bill 96 contract/warranty French rules in effect; freelancers already struggling with TP-80 complexity.

competitors.name: QuickBooks/Wave
competitors.notes: Generic; Bill 96 French prominence not default.

mvpScope.coreJob: Create and email PDF invoice with French-primary layout and QST/GST

assumptions.statement: Creatives switch from Word templates for $15/mo
assumptions.testMethod: Free trial with 20 Mile End freelancers

g1_montrealAnchor.notes: Montreal creative economy + Bill 96 contract rules.
